summary: 500-role ranked search universe (250 federal + 250 private) is a preserved project packet for this packet converts the user's CIA DO / HUMINT / CI / Russia-Eurasia career goal into a ranked search universe: 250 federal/public purposes and 250 private-sector roles scored against alignment to DO, clearance value, HUMINT/CI tradecraft yield, and suitability for a 34-year-old Georgetown Applied Intelligence graduate with no military service, no clearance, and developing Russian.
final_use_case: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
